name: Manac Incorporated
summary: Manac Incorporated develops and supplies flame retardants, and inorganic and organic chemicals to the technological industries of various fields. It offers flame retardants added to plastics that are used in televisions, video and audio equipment, personal computers, cell phones, other IT equipment, automobiles, special applications, etc.; and pharmaceutical raw materials for dialysis, transfusion raw materials, reagents, and ion-balanced beverage raw materials. The company also provides functional materials comprising polyimide materials and films for use in electronic parts; raw materials used in the photoconductor drums of copiers, printers, etc.; raw materials for information recording materials, such as organic EL materials for displays, etc.; and purified seawater components to the fields of pharmaceuticals, food, etc. In addition, it develops, manufactures, and supplies pharmaceutical raw materials and investigational bulk drugs. Further, the company offers inorganic chloride and bromine compounds; organic bromine and iodine compounds; pharmaceuticals for animals; food additives; photosensitized materials; high performance materials; dyes; fragrances; and other ingredient materials. Manac Incorporated was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
